chapter_title: About the Forbiddance of Imitating Satan's

hadith_entries.text:
919. Narrated Jaber ; 'The Prophet
said: "Do not eat
with the left hand, for the devil eats with the left hand."
(Muslim).
13 This Hadith is conveyed through another chain of transmission
and its text differs slightly from the previous Hadith.
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)

920. Narrated Abu-Huraira; 'Allah's Messenger
said:
"The Jews and the Chrisitians do not dye (their grey hair), so
you shall do the opposite of what they do (dye your grey hair
and beards)." (Bukhari).
